com.routon.plsy.device.sdk

类 DeviceInfo

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.routon.plsy.device.sdk.DeviceInfo

  • public class DeviceInfo
extends java.lang.Object
    设备信息相关接口
    作者:
    lihuili

    • 构造器概要

      构造器 
      构造器和说明
      DeviceInfo() 

    • 方法概要

      所有方法 静态方法 具体方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      static java.lang.String getCpuSerial() 
      static java.lang.String getDataMd5(java.lang.String data)
      获取数据的md5,形如xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx
      static byte[] getDataMd5Bytes(java.lang.String data)
      获取数据的md5,形如xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx
      static java.lang.String getDataMd5Ex(java.lang.String data)
      获取数据的md5,形如xxxxxxxx-xxxxxxxx-xxxxxxxx
      static DeviceModel getDeviceModel()
      查询设备型号
      static java.lang.String getDevModelMd5() 
      static java.util.List<java.lang.String> getPathByMount()
      Use the mount command to get the path of the USB flash drive inserted by usb The path of internal storage, external storage, tf card, otg, system partition, etc. can be obtained, and the obtained U disk path is complete and correct The restriction is that the machine must be rooted
      static java.util.List<java.lang.String> getPathListByStorageManager(Context context)
      Obtain the path of the USB flash drive inserted by USB according to StorageManager Can get internal storage, sd card and all usb paths The obtained path may be incomplete, need to judge and add
      static ReaderType getReaderType()
      查询智能终端的读卡器类型
      static java.lang.String getSerialDeviceNameFor1911A()
      查询智能终端的串口设备名[用于1911A门禁电源控制]
      static java.lang.String getTermSn() 
      static java.lang.String getTermSnMd5()
      查询md5格式的设备唯一码
      static int iDR_routon_usb_mode_change(int mode) 
      static int iDR_routon_usb_mode_change(int mode, int lenUnit)

      • getPathListByStorageManager

        public static java.util.List<java.lang.String> getPathListByStorageManager(Context context)
        Obtain the path of the USB flash drive inserted by USB according to StorageManager Can get internal storage, sd card and all usb paths The obtained path may be incomplete, need to judge and add

      • getPathByMount

        public static java.util.List<java.lang.String> getPathByMount()
        Use the mount command to get the path of the USB flash drive inserted by usb The path of internal storage, external storage, tf card, otg, system partition, etc. can be obtained, and the obtained U disk path is complete and correct The restriction is that the machine must be rooted
